title: BEM-864 Curator Claude selftest
objective:
Run script:
"""
required = {
    'dispatcher': Path('tools/gpt-autonomy-relay/curator_claude_dispatch.py'),
    'relay_watch': Path('tools/gpt-autonomy-relay/relay_watch.py'),
    'mailbox_poll': Path('tools/gpt-autonomy-relay/mailbox_poll.py'),
    'curator_request': Path('governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_REQUEST_FOR_CURATOR.md'),
    'claude_task': Path('governance/tasks/pending/CLAUDE_INTERNAL_AUDIT_BEM859.md'),
    'response_mailbox': Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_RESPONSE.md'),
    'route_state': Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM863_CURATOR_CLAUDE_ROUTE.md'),
    'last_check': Path('governance/runtime/mailbox_polling/BEM859_LAST_CHECK.md'),
}
missing = [name for name, path in required.items() if not path.exists()]
relay_text = required['relay_watch'].read_text(encoding='utf-8') if required['relay_watch'].exists() else ''
wire_ok = all(token in relay_text for token in ['CURATOR_DISPATCH', 'dispatch_curator()', 'poll_mailbox()', 'while True:'])
mailbox_text = required['response_mailbox'].read_text(encoding='utf-8') if required['response_mailbox'].exists() else ''
finals = ['APPROVED', 'APPROVED_WITH_AMENDMENTS', 'BLOCKED_WITH_REASON']
final_status = None
for status in finals:
    if status in mailbox_text and 'PENDING_CLAUDE_RESPONSE' not in mailbox_text:
        final_status = status
        break
report = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM864_CURATOR_CLAUDE_SELFTEST.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
if missing:
    status_line = 'FAIL'
elif not wire_ok:
    status_line = 'FAIL_WIRING'
elif final_status:
    status_line = 'PASS_FINAL_RESPONSE_FOUND'
else:
    status_line = 'PASS_ROUTE_WORKS_WAITING_FOR_CLAUDE_RESPONSE'
report.write_text('# BEM-864 Curator-Claude selftest\nStatus: ' + status_line + '\n\n## Checks\n- dispatcher exists: ' + str(required['dispatcher'].exists()) + '\n- relay_watch wired: ' + str(wire_ok) + '\n- mailbox_poll exists: ' + str(required['mailbox_poll'].exists()) + '\n- curator request exists: ' + str(required['curator_request'].exists()) + '\n- Claude task exists: ' + str(required['claude_task'].exists()) + '\n- response mailbox exists: ' + str(required['response_mailbox'].exists()) + '\n- route state exists: ' + str(required['route_state'].exists()) + '\n- last check exists: ' + str(required['last_check'].exists()) + '\n\n## Mailbox result\n- final_status: ' + str(final_status) + '\n- pending_marker: ' + str('PENDING_CLAUDE_RESPONSE' in mailbox_text) + '\n\n## Missing\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + m for m in missing) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
ops_applied.append('BEM864 curator Claude selftest completed: ' + status_line)
"""
No issue comments.
